ontains 3 rolls with a total of 30 refuse sacks. Each bag with dimensions 16x28x38

description: Product Description Heavy duty for use where a stronger bag is required. Large plastic trash bags (16" x 28" x 38") Extra Length. Each roll has 10 bags, that's 30 bags in total! Anti-drip system allows cleanup of wet objects without messy spills. 10 bags per roll. Heavy-duty sack great for construction debris, demolitions, clean-ups, yard work, garage clean-up, workshop, or storage. IDEAL for building sites, home renovations, and other heavy-duty, industrial projects, as well as gardening, storage, and packaging. RECYCLED WASTE Heavy-duty bin bags are British Made thick and strong bin liners which are also heavy-duty Refuse garden waste bin liner. SIMPLIFY GARDEN WORK With this garden waste bag, you have plenty of space for your garden refuse without frequently emptying. Best for Grass, Leaves, Trees, Plants, Flowers, Weed, Hedges & Shrubs MULTIPURPOSE This bag is very useful & handy for any outdoor job. For large amounts of lightweight garden waste such as leaves and plant waste DIY USE DIY jobs, professional building sites, gardening projects, taking refuse to the tip Popular among contractors and commercial or residential use.
